name: v2 internal port-scan burst
description: Twenty or more Falco suspicious-network-tool fires from a single container within 10 minutes — a sweep-shaped burst rather than the occasional one-off probe the suspicious-network-tool rule already covers. Authorized vuln scans from scanner-1 produce this pattern; reconnaissance from a compromised host also produces it. Triage answers whether the source is in CMDB as a scanner role and whether the burst correlates with a scheduled scan window.
query: falco.rule: "Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container"
